channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: US gas prices rise to an average of $4 per gallon amid US-Iran attacks
item.description: Gas prices in the U.S. have climbed back to $4 a gallon as tensions escalate between the U.S. and Iran.

item.title: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate expected in Miami court
Spain fans celebrate World Cup victory, but some say Trump photo-bombed the team
item.description: President Trump joined Spain's World Cup champions on stage during their trophy celebration.

item.title: FBI provides update on fireworks explosion outside NYC federal building
item.description: NYPD sources reported that fireworks were found in a trash can and a man was detained near the federal building in Lower Manhattan.
